scale_origin.note: non-orthographic supplemental image; no direct local-world origin is defined for phase1 tracing

unknowns_noted: supp_plan is an axonometric viewport image, so orthographic meter coordinates are not trustworthy under the phase1 plan/elevation pen contract
uncaptured_visual_elements: all visible facade, roof, and window edges are intentionally not vectorized because the view is axonometric rather than plan/elevation orthographic
viewport grid background and black frame are excluded
